nasb.text: So Abraham hurried into the tent to Sarah, and said, “Quickly, prepare three measures of fine flour, knead it and make bread cakes.”

esv.text: And Abraham went quickly into the tent to Sarah and said, “Quick! Three seahs of fine flour! Knead it, and make cakes.”

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕趕快進帳棚，到撒拉那裡，說：“你快拿三斗細麵調和，作些餅。”

ccb.text: 于是，亚伯拉罕连忙进帐篷对撒拉说：“快准备三斗细面粉，和面烤饼。”

csbs.text: 于是亚伯拉罕赶快进入帐篷，到撒拉那里，说：“快拿三细亚上等的面粉，揉好做饼！”
